text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, before the autumn Tenno Sho, Daiwa
Scarlet summons Vodka to meet her somewhere
unusual.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka. You're here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I wanted to talk alone before the race.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right. But why at the planetarium?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's just for a change of pace, since we'd probably
end up arguing like usual anywhere else.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I rented the entire place out. We can
talk all we want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whirrrr!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I really don't understand the way you think.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just when I thought you went to the Derby, you
came back to the Tiara tour. Then you ran the
Arima Kinen, followed by mile races...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And now the autumn Tenno Sho? If your career
was a constellation, it would be the Jumble
constellation.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm pretty sure that's not a constellation...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Because it doesn't make sense! Just like
your career! I have no idea what it is you're trying
to do.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to race you. I want to beat you. But are
you even trying to seriously compete with me?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't run just to compete with you, ya know. It's
like...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I think we have different kinds of constellations.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What does that even mean?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's like you've got a picture all picked out in your
head, and you're tracing the dots you need to
make Virgo or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But I'm not fillin' in someone else's constellation. I'm pickin' whatever stars I like.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If all you do is scrape together random stars,
though... they're not going to form a constellation
at all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They don't have to. I don't really care about the
big picture.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I care about each, individual star.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Each... star?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer and I only choose races that I want to run
in from the bottom of my heart.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The junior G1, the Oka Sho, the Derby, the
Yasuda Kinen—they were all unforgettable races.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It may look like nonsense to you, with your nose
in your preset star chart.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But to me... each star has meanin'! And I won't
give that up.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My constellation might look like a jumble, but it's
a collection of the very brightest stars.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A collection of... the brightest stars?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've seen plenty of stars that someone like you
walkin' along the beaten track could never see.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And I've pulled them all together into my
constellation. Even though they're scattered, and
no two are the same.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You don't understand how awesome that is. That's
all I'm sayin'.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: O-of course I don't understand. No one would!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You will after the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I'm goin' to the Tenno Sho just so I can
show ya.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My path may look like aimlessly drifting stardust
in your eyes. But, to me, that path has more
meaning than anything else!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho is the big race where I finally put
my new technique into action and face off against
you, the number one.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I... I promised myself I wouldn't stand in front of
ya until I became the me I wanted to be.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And now the time has come. That's why I'm
standin' here now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So whaddya think? Still think I'm no match for ya?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I don't get it. Even if I think I get it in my
head, I don't get it in my heart. But...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I guess it's better that I don't understand. If I
understood my opponent, it wouldn't be much of
a competition.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
After all, if we understood each other, it's
obvious I'd be the winner since I'm number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That's why you're my rival.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Fine. Bring it on! This next race is the real
showdown between your technique and mine!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's settle this. We'll both have a full tank
and a full tune-up! May the best racer win!
